input: Run node development on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected node development output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the node development workflow

input: Apply node development to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive node development analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to node development
